name: svg-illustrations
description: Standalone zero-JS HTML SVG illustration sheet: a header lead above a stack of inline-SVG figures, each on a bordered canvas with a caption title and sub. Palette-locked, self-contained SVGs with no external assets. The reference's download-button scripting is dropped (purely visual; HTML-only, no MD/JSON sibling).

slots.description: Sheet title; used in <title> and the h1.
Header lead paragraph describing the illustration set and its drawing rules.
Small mono meta line, e.g. dimensions and asset notes.
Illustration figures; each renders an inline SVG on a canvas with a caption title and sub.
Footer provenance line, auto-filled by the agent.
